info.english_meaning: to amuse oneself to enjoy to play to gamble to make a noise

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yad didyavaH pftanAsu prakrIqAn' (f॰4.41.11) prakrIqanti viharanti Kelanti
yErindraH prakrIqate padGozESCAyayA saha (aTarva॰5.21.8) AtmAnaM vinodayatItyarTaH
'prakrIqituM siMhaSiSuM balAtkAreRa karzati (SA॰7)
'tasya saNkrIqamAnasya mahAdevasya DImataH SitikaRWasya devasya divyaM varzaSataM gatam' (rA॰1.36.6).. saNkrIqamAnasya=ramamARasya=vihAramanuBavataH nArTaH samA
'haraH saNkrIqamAnaSca umayA saha parvate' (rA॰1.47.10)
citraM saNkrIqamAnAstAH krIqanErviviDEH (rA॰1.9.14) ukto'rTaH
'saNkrIqanti SakawAni' (pA॰1.3.21 sUtravfttO) kUjantItyarTaH
'saNkrIqate Kale rAmA nage meGo'mbu muYcati' (bf0 ka0 ko0 5829) saNkrIqate krIqati Kelati Kale iti sAmIpye saptamI
'tAsAM saNkrIqamAnAnAmeva vAditraniHsvanaH' (rA0 31120) ukto'rTaH
'yaTAtmatantro BagavAnvikrIqatyAtmamAyayA' (BA0 pu0 2823) vikrIqati viharati anAyastastAstA lIlAH samAcaratItyarTaH
'vikrIqito yaTEvAhaM krIqAmfga ivADamaH' (BA0 pu0 6237) vikrIqitaH krIqanakatAM nItaH
'vikrIqya suciraM BImo rAkzasena sahAnaGa nijaGAna mahAvIryastaM tadA…' (BA0 356).. vikrIqya=prahasya narmavacanamudIrya
'AkrIqamAno hfzwAtmA' (BA0 vana0 14627) krIqan ityarTaH pumAn AkrIqa udyAnamityamaraH
'rudrasyAkrIqasadfSaH saMhAraH sarvadehinAm' (BA0 droRa0 12444) AkrIqaH krIqanaM krIqA
'tato gatvodyAnaM yaTAsuKamAkrIqya' (avi0 1) AkrIqya krIqitvA
'AkrIqatAmaruRapAdasaroruhAByAmArdre madIyahfdaye BuvanArdramojaH' (kfzRAmfte Slo0 15) AkrIqatAM samantAt svEraM kIqatu viharatu
'tasyAScatvAri catvAryakzarARi nikrIqayanniva gAyati' (lAwyA0 SrO0 7129)
'ta enamatyakrIqan' (tE0 brA0 167) dyUtakriyayA devanenAtyaSeratetyAha
'yEH parikrIqase sIte viSvastErmfgapotakEH' (rA0 3615) parikrIqase paritaH krIqasi
'marutastamaBitaH paricikrIquH' (Sa0 brA0 25220)
'parikrIqasva sAnuzu' (Bawwi0 810)
'sAmAtyaH samparikrIqan kAmasya vaSamAgataH' (rA0 43016) samparikrIqan prahasan narma sevamAnaH sAmAtyaparizat krIqan pAnamevopasevate iti pAWAntaram idaM ca 3079 ityatra dAkziRAtyakoSezu drazwavyam
'upakrIqanti tAnrAjan SuBAScApsarasAM gaRAH' (BA0 anu0 8130) upakrIqanti upetya krIqanti samIpe krIqanti upasargavaSAt sakarmakatvam
